sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60423" key="kuami=tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠᾰμ-ῖτις</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀγορά</foreign>), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n60423.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bean-market</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">837c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
